query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: An arched window with divided panes emits bright daylight near the left edge of the frame, viewed past a vertical wall edge or door frame in an otherwise dark interior. The right side of the frame is almost entirely black, with visible detail limited to the window and a narrow band of adjacent wall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An arched window with divided panes emits bright daylight near the left edge of the frame, viewed past a vertical wall edge or door frame. The image employs extreme underexposure that buries most of the frame in crushed black, reducing the dark interior to near-total opacity while the window itself appears blown out, creating a stark, graphic separation between light and darkness.
